features: 【Premium Quality】WUBAYI gift wrapping paper is made of recyclable high quality paper material, green, safe and durable, the wrapping paper is thick and not easy to tear, with a smooth and glossy effect, ensuring that your vintage wrapping paper has a premium look and feel. This biodegradable wrapping paper set can be folded over and over again, not easy to damage, perfect for all kinds of gift wrapping

【Great Value Wrapping Paper Set】Our wrapping paper set comes with string and tags. Includes 6 sheets of folded wrapping paper, 9* gift tags, 2* Ropes, 1* Double-Side Tap. Wrapping paper kraft can meet the needs of most sizes of gift wrapping, it is the perfect combination for gift wrapping
【Good Size】Each sheet of wrapping paper measures 27.6 x 19.7 inches (70 x 50 cm), which can cover small and medium-sized boxes, with superior quality and won't tear

【Widely Applicable】Six different patterns make the gift wrapping paper perfect for birthdays, congratulations, holidays, weddings, babies, Christmas, invitations to homes, Halloween, Easter, and other gift wrapping. It is also suitable for craft projects and bouquet packaging, as well as other art-inspired creations

【Not Roll Packaging】Please note that each sheet is shipped folded for easy storage and space saving, the paper will have creases and folds, you can easily hide the creases with a ribbon or place it along the edges of the box for neat gift wrapping. Please note this before purchasing
